# System Context (C4 Level 1)
<!-- Auto-generated by sentinel scan on 2026-06-22 -->

The dotfiles environment is operated by a single developer and provisions a macOS workstation, integrating with Homebrew, GitHub, BetterDisplay, displayplacer, OBS, Stream Deck + Raycast, and Claude Code.

```mermaid
graph TD
  dev["Lucas - Developer/Operator"]
  sys["dotfiles environment<br/>(GNU Stow packages)"]
  dev -->|edits configs, runs install.sh| sys
  dev -->|taps keys| sd["Stream Deck + Raycast"]
  sys -->|installs packages/casks| brew["Homebrew"]
  sys -->|version control / sync| gh["GitHub"]
  sys -->|display mode + brightness| bd["BetterDisplay CLI"]
  sys -->|resolution / rotation / origin| dp["displayplacer"]
  sys -->|stream / scene switching| obs["OBS"]
  sd -->|raycast:// fires layout + mode scripts| sys
  sys -->|billing + status surfacing| cc["Claude Code"]
```
